variables.input: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == "Sky" | fields json.companyName | dedup json.companyName

fetch bizevents 
| filter json.companyName == $CompanyName
| fields json.journeyType | dedup json.journeyType
fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | filter json.companyName == "Sky" | fields json.stepName | dedup json.stepName

fetch bizevents
| fields json.serviceName, json.companyName, json.journeyType
| summarize count(),by:{json.companyName, json.journeyType, json.serviceName}
| filter json.companyName == $CompanyName 
| filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType)
| dedup json.serviceName
| fields json.serviceName = lower(json.serviceName)
| filter isNotNull(json.serviceName)

smartscapeNodes PROCESS
| lookup [smartscapeNodes SERVICE | fields id, name], sourceField:name, lookupField:name, prefix:"svc."
| lookup [timeseries cpu = avg(dt.process.cpu.usage), by:{dt.smartscape.process}], sourceField:id, lookupField:dt.smartscape.process, fields:{cpu}
| filter isNotNull(cpu)
| fieldsAdd LowerService = lower(name)
| filter in(LowerService, $Service)
| fields id
| dedup id

0.content:
# Create a C-level executive dashboard focused on revenue impa
## Sky | Cancellation Retention Journey | Business Observability
**Data Signals:** 🔧 Services
---

3.title: 📈 Total Journey Volume
3.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | summarize TotalEvents = count()

4.title: ✅ Journey Success Rate
4.query:
fetch bizevents 
| filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" 
| filter json.companyName == $CompanyName 
| filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType 
| summarize total = count(), successful = countIf(isNull(additionalfields.hasError) or additionalfields.hasError == false) 
| fieldsAdd success_rate = round((toDouble(successful) / toDouble(total)) * 100, decimals:2)

5.title: 💰 Total Revenue
5.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType or $JourneyType == "*" | summarize revenue = sum(additionalfields.orderTotal)

6.title: ❌ Total Errors
6.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType or $JourneyType == "*" | summarize errors = countIf(additionalfields.hasError == true)

7.title: 🎯 Success Rate
7.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize total = count(), successful = countIf(isNull(additionalfields.hasError) or additionalfields.hasError == false) | fieldsAdd rate = round((toDouble(successful) / toDouble(total)) * 100, decimals:1)

8.title: ⚡ Error Rate
8.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize total = count(), errors = countIf(additionalfields.hasError == true) | fieldsAdd rate = round((toDouble(errors) / toDouble(total)) * 100, decimals:1)

10.title: 📊 Journey Step Metrics
10.query:
fetch bizevents 
| filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" 
| filter json.companyName == $CompanyName 
| filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType 
| summarize 
    OrdersInStep = count(), 
    SuccessRate = round((toDouble(countIf(isNull(additionalfields.hasError) or additionalfields.hasError == false)) / toDouble(count())) * 100, decimals:2),
    AvgTimeInStep = avg(additionalfields.processingTime),
    ErrorsInStep = countIf(additionalfields.hasError == true),
    ErrorRate = round((toDouble(countIf(additionalfields.hasError == true)) / toDouble(count())) * 100, decimals:2), 
    by: {json.stepName} 
| sort OrdersInStep desc

11.title: 📈 Volume Over Time
11.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | makeTimeseries successful = countIf(isNull(additionalfields.hasError) or additionalfields.hasError == false), failed = countIf(additionalfields.hasError == true), bins:30

12.title: 📊 Events by Step
12.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType or $JourneyType == "*" | summarize count = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort count desc | limit 10

13.title: 🐝 Step Health Overview
13.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize total = count(), successful = countIf(isNull(additionalfields.hasError) or additionalfields.hasError == false), by: {json.stepName} | fieldsAdd success_rate = round((toDouble(successful) / toDouble(total)) * 100, decimals:1) | fields json.stepName, success_rate

15.title: 🎯 Conversion Probability
15.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize value = avg(additionalfields.conversionProbability)

16.title: 💵 Avg Order Value
16.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize value = avg(additionalfields.averageOrderValue)

17.title: 😊 Net Promoter Score
17.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize value = avg(additionalfields.netPromoterScore)

18.title: 💵 Revenue per Customer
18.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize value = avg(additionalfields.revenuePerCustomer)

19.title: 🎯 ⏱️ Session Duration
19.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize value = avg(additionalfields.sessionDuration)

20.title: 🎯 💸 Operational Cost
20.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize value = avg(additionalfields.operationalCost)

21.title: 🎯 ✅ Compliance Score
21.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize value = avg(additionalfields.complianceScore)

22.title: 🎯 ⚡ Engagement Score
22.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize value = avg(additionalfields.engagementScore)

24.title: 📊 ⏱️ Session Duration Distribution
24.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | filter isNotNull(additionalfields.sessionDuration) | fields value = additionalfields.sessionDuration

25.title: 📊 ⏱️ Time to Conversion Distribution
25.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | filter isNotNull(additionalfields.timeToConversion) | fields value = additionalfields.timeToConversion

26.title: 🤝 Retention Probability
26.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize Value = avg(additionalfields.retentionProbability), Events = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort Value desc

27.title: ⭐ Satisfaction Rating
27.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize Value = avg(additionalfields.satisfactionRating), Events = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort Value desc

28.title: 📊 Profit Margin
28.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize Value = avg(additionalfields.profitMargin), Events = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort Value desc

29.title: 🎯 Conversion Rate
29.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize Value = avg(additionalfields.conversionRate), Events = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort Value desc

30.title: 💰 Transaction Value
30.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize Value = sum(additionalfields.transactionValue), Events = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort Value desc

31.title: 💰 Order Total
31.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize Value = sum(additionalfields.orderTotal), Events = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort Value desc

32.title: 💎 Customer Lifetime Value
32.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize Value = avg(additionalfields.customerLifetimeValue), P90 = percentile(additionalfields.customerLifetimeValue, 90), Events = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort Value desc

33.title: 📑 Contract Value
33.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize Value = avg(additionalfields.contractValue), Events = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort Value desc

34.title: 📈 Annual Revenue
34.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize Value = avg(additionalfields.annualRevenue), Events = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort Value desc

35.title: ⏱️ Processing Time
35.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize Value = avg(additionalfields.processingTime), P90 = percentile(additionalfields.processingTime, 90), Events = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort Value desc

36.title: 📅 Seasonal Impact
36.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize Value = avg(additionalfields.seasonalImpact), Events = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort Value desc

37.title: 📊 Market Share
37.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize Value = avg(additionalfields.marketShare), Events = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort Value desc

38.title: 📄 Page Views
38.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize Value = avg(additionalfields.pageViews), Events = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort Value desc

39.title: ⚙️ Efficiency Rating
39.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize Value = avg(additionalfields.efficiencyRating), Events = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort Value desc

40.title: 📊 Resource Utilization
40.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize Value = avg(additionalfields.resourceUtilization), Events = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort Value desc

41.title: 🔄 Purchase Frequency
41.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize Value = avg(additionalfields.purchaseFrequency), Events = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort Value desc

42.title: 💲 Product Price
42.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize Value = avg(additionalfields.Price), Events = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort Value desc

43.title: 🏷️ Discount Applied
43.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize Value = avg(additionalfields.discountApplied), Events = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort Value desc

44.title: 🧾 Tax Amount
44.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize Value = sum(additionalfields.taxAmount), Events = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort Value desc

45.title: 📦 Shipping Cost
45.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize Value = avg(additionalfields.shippingCost), Events = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort Value desc

46.title: 💸 Acquisition Cost
46.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize Value = avg(additionalfields.acquisitionCost), Events = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort Value desc

47.title: 📈 Upsell Potential
47.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize Value = avg(additionalfields.upsellPotential), Events = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort Value desc

48.title: 💸 Cost per Acquisition
48.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize Value = avg(additionalfields.costPerAcquisition), Events = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort Value desc

49.title: 🌱 Growth Potential
49.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize Value = avg(additionalfields.growthPotential), Events = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort Value desc

50.title: 🔮 Future Value
50.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize Value = avg(additionalfields.futureValue), Events = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort Value desc

51.title: 🔬 🎯 Conversion Probability vs 💵 Avg Order Value Correlation
51.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | filter isNotNull(additionalfields.conversionProbability) AND isNotNull(additionalfields.averageOrderValue) | fields x = additionalfields.conversionProbability, y = additionalfields.averageOrderValue, step = json.stepName | limit 500

52.title: 📈 💵 Avg Order Value Trend Over Time
52.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | makeTimeseries revenue = avg(additionalfields.averageOrderValue), volume = count(), bins:30

54.title: 🏢 Market Segment
54.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | filter isNotNull(additionalfields.marketSegment) | summarize Count = count(), by: {additionalfields.marketSegment} | sort Count desc

56.title: 🚪 Abandonment Risk
56.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | filter isNotNull(additionalfields.abandonmentRisk) | summarize Count = count(), by: {additionalfields.abandonmentRisk} | sort Count desc

57.title: 🔄 Cross-Sell Opportunity
57.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | filter isNotNull(additionalfields.crossSellOpportunity) | summarize Count = count(), by: {additionalfields.crossSellOpportunity} | sort Count desc

58.title: 🏅 Membership Status
58.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | filter isNotNull(additionalfields.membershipStatus) | summarize Count = count(), by: {additionalfields.membershipStatus} | sort Count desc

59.title: 🎯 Customer Intent
59.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | filter isNotNull(additionalfields.customerIntent) | summarize Count = count(), by: {additionalfields.customerIntent} | sort Count desc

60.title: 📋 Subscription Level
60.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | filter isNotNull(additionalfields.subscriptionLevel) | summarize Count = count(), by: {additionalfields.subscriptionLevel} | sort Count desc

61.title: 🔒 Security Rating
61.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | filter isNotNull(additionalfields.securityRating) | summarize Count = count(), by: {additionalfields.securityRating} | sort Count desc

62.title: ⚠️ Churn Risk
62.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | filter isNotNull(additionalfields.churnRisk) | summarize Count = count(), by: {additionalfields.churnRisk} | sort Count desc

63.title: 💎 Pricing Tier
63.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | filter isNotNull(additionalfields.pricingTier) | summarize Count = count(), by: {additionalfields.pricingTier} | sort Count desc

64.title: ⭐ Loyalty Status
64.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | filter isNotNull(additionalfields.loyaltyStatus) | summarize Count = count(), by: {additionalfields.loyaltyStatus} | sort Count desc

65.title: 👥 Segment Value
65.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | filter isNotNull(additionalfields.customerSegmentValue) | summarize Count = count(), by: {additionalfields.customerSegmentValue} | sort Count desc

66.title: ⚠️ Risk Level
66.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | filter isNotNull(additionalfields.riskLevel) | summarize Count = count(), by: {additionalfields.riskLevel} | sort Count desc

67.title: 🛡️ Fraud Risk
67.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | filter isNotNull(additionalfields.fraudRisk) | summarize Count = count(), by: {additionalfields.fraudRisk} | sort Count desc

68.title: 📦 Product Name
68.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | filter isNotNull(additionalfields.Productname) | summarize Count = count(), by: {additionalfields.Productname} | sort Count desc

69.title: 🏷️ Product ID (SKU)
69.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | filter isNotNull(additionalfields.ProductId) | summarize Count = count(), by: {additionalfields.ProductId} | sort Count desc

70.title: 📂 Product Type
70.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | filter isNotNull(additionalfields.ProductType) | summarize Count = count(), by: {additionalfields.ProductType} | sort Count desc

72.title: 💼 Journey Events (Filtered)
72.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType or $JourneyType == "*" | filter in(json.stepName, $Step) | summarize total = count()

73.title: 💰 Revenue (Filtered)
73.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType or $JourneyType == "*" | filter in(json.stepName, $Step) | summarize revenue = sum(additionalfields.orderTotal)

74.title: 💵 Avg Order Value
74.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType or $JourneyType == "*" | filter in(json.stepName, $Step) | summarize avg = avg(additionalfields.orderTotal)

75.title: ⏱️ P90 Response Time
75.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType or $JourneyType == "*" | filter in(json.stepName, $Step) | summarize p90 = percentile(additionalfields.processingTime, 90)

76.title: 📈 Events Over Time (Filtered)
76.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType or $JourneyType == "*" | filter in(json.stepName, $Step) | makeTimeseries events = count(), bins:30

77.title: 📊 Events by Step (Filtered)
77.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType or $JourneyType == "*" | summarize count = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort count desc | limit 10

79.title: 🕐 Hourly Activity Pattern
79.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | fieldsAdd hour = toString(getHour(timestamp)) | summarize Events = count(), by: {hour} | sort hour asc

80.title: 📊 Event Volume Distribution
80.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize count = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort count desc

81.title: ⏱️ Processing Time Trend
81.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | makeTimeseries avg_processing = avg(additionalfields.processingTime), p90_processing = percentile(additionalfields.processingTime, 90), bins:30

82.title: 📉 Success vs Failure Trend
82.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | makeTimeseries success = countIf(json.journeyStatus == "Success"), failed = countIf(json.journeyStatus == "Failed"), bins:30

83.title: 📐 Processing Time Range (Min / Avg / Max)
83.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | makeTimeseries min_time = min(additionalfields.processingTime), avg_time = avg(additionalfields.processingTime), max_time = max(additionalfields.processingTime), bins:30

84.title: 📊 Processing Time Distribution
84.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | filter isNotNull(additionalfields.processingTime) | fields processingTime = additionalfields.processingTime
